title: French Comfort Cozy
description: A hearty Norwegian-inspired French dish, perfect for a cold night. This tender and creamy comfort food will leave you feeling cozy.
instructions: 1. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium-high heat.
2. Add beef strips and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In the same skillet, cook onion and garlic until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Sprinkle flour over the onion mixture and cook for 1 minute.
5. Gradually add beef broth, whisking continuously, and bring to a boil.
6. Return beef to the skillet and simmer until heated through.
7. Stir in heavy cream and grated cheese until melted and smooth.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
